title: Master Service Agreement
content_summary: Core agreement establishing payment terms, liability cap, confidentiality, and termination provisions

title: Statement of Work - Project Alpha
content_summary: Cloud migration project with fixed pricing, governed by MSA terms and rates from Pricing Schedule

title: Statement of Work - Project Beta
content_summary: Security audit project with liability cap implications and confidentiality requirements

title: Pricing Schedule
content_summary: Hourly rates for engineering and management services, subject to MSA liability cap

title: Amendment No. 1 to MSA
content_summary: Updates liability cap from $1M to $2M, adds data protection article, extends confidentiality survival
